title: Oxyceros rectispinus
intro: Oxyceros rectispinus, also known as the Himalayan Balsam or Bittersweet, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The health benefits of Oxyceros rectispinus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, Oxyceros rectispinus is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
